news.headline: Three brothers of Iraqi origin arrested over US embassy blast in Oslo
news.summary:

news.headline: Starmer Was Warned About Risk of Appointing Friend of Epstein As Ambassador
news.summary: British officials told Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Peter Mandelson’s close ties to Jeffrey Epstein before Mr. Mandelson was appointed U.S. ambassador.

news.headline: Why Did the UK Police Repeatedly Decline to Investigate Claims About Epstein and Prince Andrew?
news.summary: The police in London interviewed Virginia Giuffre three times over her allegations about Jeffrey Epstein, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Ghislaine Maxwell, but never began a criminal investigation.
